requirement_topic.en: 50 Hz Electrical Settings and China GB/T 18487 Mapping
requirement_topic.zh: 50 Hz 电气参数与中国 GB/T 18487 映射
requirement_topic.zht: 50 Hz 電氣參數與中國 GB/T 18487 映射

summary.en: Tanzania charging projects should configure EVSE to local AC supply conditions and DNO connection limits, including 50 Hz operation, voltage range, phase arrangement, earthing, protection coordination, and power-quality constraints. EWURA's guidance points charging safety to IEC 61851 and requires DNO assessment for higher-load chargers; IEC 61851-1 covers EVSE operating conditions and electrical safety. China GB/T 18487 evidence should be checked against these Tanzania site settings rather than assumed transferable.
summary.zh: 坦桑尼亚充电项目应按当地交流供电条件和 DNO 接入限制配置 EVSE，包括 50 Hz 运行、电压范围、相制、接地、保护配合和电能质量约束。EWURA 指引将充电安全指向 IEC 61851，并要求较高负荷充电桩接受 DNO 评估；IEC 61851-1 涵盖 EVSE 运行条件和电气安全。中国 GB/T 18487 证据应针对这些坦桑尼亚站点参数核查，而不能假定可直接迁移。
summary.zht: 坦尚尼亞充電項目應按當地交流供電條件和 DNO 接入限制配置 EVSE，包括 50 Hz 運行、電壓範圍、相制、接地、保護配合和電能品質約束。EWURA 指引將充電安全指向 IEC 61851，並要求較高負荷充電樁接受 DNO 評估；IEC 61851-1 涵蓋 EVSE 運行條件和電氣安全。中國 GB/T 18487 證據應針對這些坦尚尼亞站點參數核查，而不能假定可直接遷移。

standards_or_laws: EWURA Guidelines for E-Mobility Charging Stations and Battery Swapping 2026
DNO connection conditions for AC supply and protection settings

summary.en: China GB/T 18487.1-2023 is current for general requirements, while GB/T 18487.5-2024 and GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 updates address DC systems and communication for GB/T connectors. These China standards are valuable baselines, but Tanzania acceptance depends on IEC 61851 mapping, local supply frequency and voltage settings, connector choice, DNO assessment, and site commissioning evidence.
summary.zh: 中国 GB/T 18487.1-2023 是现行通用要求，GB/T 18487.5-2024 以及 GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 更新涉及 GB/T 接口直流系统和通信。这些中国标准是有价值的基线，但坦桑尼亚接受程度取决于 IEC 61851 映射、当地供电频率和电压参数、接口选择、DNO 评估以及现场调试证据。
summary.zht: 中國 GB/T 18487.1-2023 是現行通用要求，GB/T 18487.5-2024 以及 GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 更新涉及 GB/T 接口直流系統和通訊。這些中國標準是有價值的基線，但坦尚尼亞接受程度取決於 IEC 61851 映射、當地供電頻率和電壓參數、接口選擇、DNO 評估以及現場調試證據。

gap.en: Document nameplate frequency, firmware grid settings, AC input tolerance, derating at 50 Hz, RCD and protective-device selection, earthing system compatibility, and a commissioning checklist that proves the China GB/T configuration has been adapted to the Tanzania site.
gap.zh: 应记录铭牌频率、固件电网参数、交流输入容差、50 Hz 降额、RCD 和保护器件选择、接地系统兼容性，以及证明中国 GB/T 配置已适配坦桑尼亚站点的调试清单。
gap.zht: 應記錄銘牌頻率、韌體電網參數、交流輸入容差、50 Hz 降額、RCD 和保護器件選擇、接地系統相容性，以及證明中國 GB/T 配置已適配坦尚尼亞站點的調試清單。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory or commissioning-critical where DNO connection, IEC 61851 safety review, electrical installation inspection, or completion certificate depends on site electrical settings
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 compliance is a baseline, not proof that the charger is configured for Tanzania 50 Hz site conditions

source.publisher: State Administration for Market Regulation / Standardization Administration of China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Verify 50 Hz and site electrical settings during Tanzania commissioning. A current GB/T file helps, but it does not prove local grid adaptation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应在坦桑尼亚调试阶段核验 50 Hz 和站点电气参数。现行 GB/T 文件有帮助，但不能证明已完成本地电网适配。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應在坦尚尼亞調試階段核驗 50 Hz 和站點電氣參數。現行 GB/T 文件有幫助，但不能證明已完成本地電網適配。
